\tzpentry{ID4558}{Carrier Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4558 introduces Carrier Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_{\text{carrier}} = \frac{v_s}{\lambda} \approx 17.2 \text{ kHz} \implies \text{Phase-Lock with } \UpdateOperator \end{equation}
